title: Hud_vanilla pack
description: HUD_Vanilla Pack refreshes Minecraft’s HUD with colorful health, armor, and food bars. A glowing 7-color XP bar adds magic, while keeping vanilla’s familiar style modern, polished, and much more.
body:
## hello
____

The Vanilla HUD Pack gives Minecraft's HUD a dynamic upgrade. Health, armor, and food have been redesigned with clearer, more colorful icons. The experience bar now has 7 additional colors, giving you a magical gaming experience. This pack keeps the familiar style but still gives it a modern, friendly look—and more.
____
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d473b452dbb15b24142dde1b1870051e9015d34c_0.webp)](https://discord.gg/PfknxDj2y)
____
